System Preparation: Creates a complete timestamped backup of all system settings, registry keys, services, power plans, and app configs before tweaks — your safety net for easy restore.
Creates a full System Restore Point with optimized settings for maximum safety before applying any tweaks.
Runs DISM, SFC, component cleanup, and CHKDSK to detect and repair corrupted Windows files and system integrity.

General Tweaks: Imports and activates the custom Nyrex Power Plan — maximum performance, lower latency, and better thermals.
Applies advanced NTFS optimizations to boost file system speed, reduce latency, and improve disk responsiveness.
Aggressively disables Windows Defender, exploit mitigations, and security bloat to free up CPU/RAM.
Completely disables all telemetry, diagnostics, tracking, and data collection for maximum privacy and lower background load.
Optimizes File Explorer, taskbar, desktop, and UI animations for a snappier and cleaner Windows experience.
Optimizes Windows boot configuration for significantly faster startup and reduced boot-time services.
Stops and disables dozens of unnecessary Windows services to free up RAM, CPU, and disk I/O.
Dynamically splits Svchost processes based on your RAM size for better memory management and stability.

App Debloat: Removes pre-installed Microsoft bloatware and unwanted apps in one click.
Clears Discord cache, disables telemetry, hardware acceleration, animations, and rich presence — lighter and faster.
Applies 100+ policies to strip Microsoft Edge of telemetry, ads, suggestions, and bloat.
Kills all Adobe background processes, disables services, and removes Creative Cloud bloat and auto-updates.
Disables Chrome telemetry, tracking, safe browsing, and unwanted features for better speed and privacy.
Strips Firefox of telemetry, Pocket, studies, crash reporting, and other Mozilla bloat.
Clears Spotify cache/logs and disables auto-start/telemetry for a lightweight music experience.
Optimizes TikTok LIVE Studio by clearing cache and disabling analytics & crash reporting.
Disables Brave Rewards, Wallet, AI chat, promotions, and all telemetry via official policies.

Graphics: Full NVIDIA optimization suite — low-latency profile, MSI interrupts, power tweaks, and driver registry fixes.
Advanced AMD GPU optimizations — disables power gating, reduces latency, and boosts 3D/gaming performance.

System & Network: Sets keyboard & mouse to raw 1:1 input with zero acceleration and maximum responsiveness.
Enables Multimedia Class Scheduler Service for smoother gaming, audio, and video performance.
Disables hibernation, power throttling, and unnecessary power-saving features for instant responsiveness.
Sets optimal foreground/background process priority for buttery-smooth multitasking.
Optimizes TCP/IP stack, disables IPv6 bloat, enables BBR2, and tunes network adapters for lowest latency.

Shortcuts & UI: Enables file extensions in Explorer so you always see .exe, .bat, .js, etc.
Adds "End task" option to the right-click taskbar menu for instant process killing.
Disables desktop wallpaper to save RAM and GPU resources (great for low-end systems).
Forces system-wide Dark Mode for Windows and all apps.
Creates a convenient "System Info" shortcut on your desktop for quick hardware diagnostics.
Restart to BIOS Shortcut on Desktop
Creates a one-click "Restart to BIOS" shortcut on your desktop.
